notes: v0.16.76 — Mini-boss redesign LAB. Standalone preview scene replaces the menu so you can browse all 12 prototypes. Keys: 1..4 picks boss family, A/S/D picks variant, R resets. 4 FAMILIES × 3 VARIANTS = 12 designs to compare. (1) PRISM CORE — rotating prism, each face is a different weapon (MG / LASER / SHOT / RING-PULSE), active face = the one pointing at you. Variants: TRIANGLE 3-face, SQUARE 4-face, ALL-ACTIVE (all fire simultaneously, only active one is buffed). (2) MITOSIS — pulsing cell that spawns chasing clones on the beat, splits on HP thresholds. Variants: HEARTBEAT (2 clones / 4 beats), SLOW-SPLIT (3 clones / 6 beats), CASCADE (splits at 75 / 50 / 25 % HP). (3) HOROLOGIST — clock with a rotating hand. The boss fires a beam where the hand POINTED 1 s ago — dodge the future position, not the pointer. Variants: SINGLE HAND, TWO HANDS, PENDULUM (sweeping back-and-forth instead of full rotation). (4) HIVE MOTHER — hex body invulnerable while ANY drone is alive. Clear all drones → 4 s exposed window with radial panic-fire → boss respawns drones. Variants: SINGLE RING 6, DOUBLE RING 6+3, SHIELD-WALL 4 (big tanky shield drones that BLOCK your bullets). Auto-pilot player + HP bar + boss HP bar + phase chip + mechanic description per variant. Pick favourites and I will replace the live mini-bosses with the chosen designs. Windows only.
